category_sources: Official GitHub README describes cue/toc parsers and utilities.
source_facts.description says cuetools provides utilities for .cue and .toc files.

docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface; README also notes a doc directory with man pages.

tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists cueconvert, cuebreakpoints, and cueprint tools.
